title: trifolium vesiculosum subsp. setiferum
intro: Trifolium vesiculosum subsp. setiferum, also known as the hairy milk vetch, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of hairy milk vetch include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Hairy milk vetch can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
